title: ICAP
description: Add 18 crafting items to the game to create non-crafting items
body:
This mod adds 18 crafts for vanilla items that had no crafting before
You will be able to craft:
Golden Apple
Enchanted Golden Apple
Iron horse armor 
Golden Horse Armor
Diamond horse armor
Heart of the Sea
Ringed Helmet/Cuirass/pants/Boots
Saddle
Globe banner pattern
Snout banner pattern
 
And more
